summary: An FBI FD-302 documents an interview with an Army soldier at Fort Carson who reported that in early February 2022, he and four others observed a motionless, matte white, bean-shaped object hovering over a saddle in Cheyenne Mountain for several minutes before it vanished. The witnesses later compared independently drawn sketches that matched, and one reportedly filed an official report and was later contacted by AARO in 2024.
